seo.title: Online Favicon Generator | Creative Lab
seo.description: Create PNG and ICO favicons from an image directly in your browser with Creative Lab. Generate web sizes and download the complete result.
seo.ogDescription: Create favicons for your website directly in the browser.
seo.twitterDescription: Generate PNG and ICO favicons from an image in your browser.

product.title: Favicon Generator
product.description: Turn an image into favicons ready for your website, with multiple sizes and PNG or ICO downloads.

generator.title: Select an image
generator.intro: Use a square image or transparent logo for the best results.
generator.uploadTitle: Drag an image here or click to select it
generator.uploadHelp: JPG, PNG, WebP or SVG. Maximum 15 MB.

messages.invalidFormat: Select a JPG, PNG, WebP or SVG image.
messages.fileTooLarge: The image exceeds the 15 MB limit.
messages.readError: The image could not be read.
messages.canvasError: The browser could not generate the favicon.
messages.generateError: The favicon could not be generated.
messages.icoSizeError: Select at least one size of 256 pixels or less.

info.eyebrow: A small detail that identifies your site
info.title: How to create a favicon with Creative Lab
info.description: Select an image, adjust the framing, generate multiple sizes and download the favicon as PNG or ICO.
info.stepOneText: Select a logo or image from your device.
info.stepTwoText: Choose the background, fit and sizes you need.
info.stepThreeText: Save the PNG files or create an ICO file for your site.
